title: Kelethin Quests - Gandak's Ill-Fated Trip
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following Kelethin quest.

requirements.label: Complete Faerik Windrunner's quest "Gandak's Ill-Fated Trip" in The Greater Faydark

title: Quarm: Early Bird Bonus (Temporary)
description: Logging into Quarm during the first two weeks of its opening grants you a bonus claim (one reward per account).

requirements.label: Log in to Quarm between July 13-27
Visibility requirements: Quarm into 2 week event is active
